name: Non-Fat Whipped Topping (Health Valley)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Instant nonfat dry milk solids
1 teaspoon Honey, up to 2 teaspoons to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the nonfat milk into a small metal mixing bowl.
2. Set the bowl in the freezer until ice crystals begin to form; about 15 to 20 minutes.
3. Chill the beaters from the mixer in the freezer as well.
4. Using a hand-held electric mixer, beat the instant nonfat dry milk solids into the nonfat milk.
5. Continue to beat on high until soft peaks form; about 2 minutes.
6. Add honey to taste and vanilla, then beat until stiff peaks form; about 2 additional minutes.
7. Use within 20 minutes to avoid cream separating.
Makes 1 1/2 cups. The product contains 14 calories with 6% fat content!
